query:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.externalId) AS sasboss_internet_with_billing
FROM services s
JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
WHERE s.supplierName = 'SasBoss' AND s.serviceType = 'Internet';
